title: Context Operating Systems for established businesses

insertText.text: Context Operating Systems for established businesses
Get agent-ready before you get leapfrogged.

Agents are becoming the gateway to B2B buying. Businesses without APIs, MCP servers, or an integration layer are invisible to them — and AI-on-AI content decay raises the premium on proprietary, human-crafted knowledge. The businesses that make their expertise legible to agents in the next two-to-three years stay in the frame; the rest get routed around.
a paid qualifying workshop; leave with a scored readiness map + shortlisted POCs
2–3 ROI-led builds in weeks on a reusable, open-source agentic platform
a 12-month engagement that owns product, AI strategy, and multi-stream delivery
Retired a planned six-figure HubSpot migration

360 is a fully independent, founder-owned operator: open-source where it can be, MCP-native throughout, Anthropic-aligned, accredited from day one (Cyber Essentials Plus), and hosted on independent infrastructure. Auditable at every layer — what runs on it, who reads the code, and where the data lives.
